treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Auset — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Overcome the domination of your cravings and emotions to exert full self-control over your life.
Ability to rise above all forms of compulsions and impulses.
The Power to successfully manage ourselves, enterprises, and others.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being endowed with the ability to choose to respond to all challenges in a peaceful way to guarantee the wellbeing of everyone.
You could have made us bound to our psyche, as you imprisoned the animals, and human kind. Thank you, God for the freedom of the will, emblem of our divinity.
It is my divine intuition that tells me that I am a free being.
Peace is the opposite of anger, fear, worry, grief, sadness, and stress, which are forms of suffering. Thank you, God for endowing me with the ability to choose the Peace that is my nature.
I take neither gain, nor loss to heart. I will remain at peace.
If you don't choose to live in peace, you will not rest in peace.
Thank you God for the opportunity to establish dominion over all that occurs in my being. The freedom of my will is the essence of my divinity.
